query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as response_count
FROM responses r
JOIN organizations o ON r.organizationId = o.id
WHERE (o.name LIKE '%RRMC%' OR o.slug LIKE '%rrmc%')
AND r.response IS NOT NULL AND r.response != '';
